**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, MAY 11th**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**As the legislative session winds down and Republicans gather tomorrow in Meredith for our State Party’s convention, I want to remind everyone about the good things Republicans have achieved since the 2016 election.**
****

**Republicans in Concord have lowered taxes, cut regulations, and expanded opportunity. By empowering Granite State entrepreneurs large and small, our economy has been thriving, as the fastest growing economy in the region and one of the fastest in the nation.**
****

**Republicans have stood up and defended the Second Amendment. We kicked off the legislative agenda last year by implementing Constitutional Carry, and House Republicans have held the line while liberals have proposed to further regulate and infringe upon our God-given rights to bear arms.**

**Republicans have greatly accelerated educational opportunity and school choice, expanding scholarship opportunities and tax credit programs in the Granite State. While educational savings accounts were defeated this week with 100% of the Democrat caucus voting against the interest of students and families, the fight continues.**

**Republicans have achieved a lot, but we all know there is still more to do and more accomplishments to better the Granite State. We need our activists from across New Hampshire to be engaged in this upcoming election cycle.**

**When we re-elect Governor Chris Sununu and send him expanded majorities in the House, Senate, and Executive Council, we won’t just be defying history - we’ll be making it.**

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment**
_For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire._

_In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law._

_In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord._

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, MAY 11th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, As the legislative session winds down and Republicans gather tomorrow in Meredith for our State Party’s convention, I want to remind everyone about the good things Republicans have achieved since the 2016 election. ** Republicans in Concord have lowered taxes, cut regulations, and expanded opportunity. By empowering Granite State entrepreneurs large and small, our economy has been thriving, as the fastest growing economy in the region and one of the fastest in the nation. Republicans have stood up and defended the Second Amendment. We kicked off the legislative agenda last year by implementing Constitutional Carry, and House Republicans have held the line while liberals have proposed to further regulate and infringe upon our God-given rights to bear arms. Republicans have greatly accelerated educational opportunity and school choice, expanding scholarship opportunities and tax credit programs in the Granite State. While educational savings accounts were defeated this week with 100% of the Democrat caucus voting against the interest of students and families, the fight continues. Republicans have achieved a lot, but we all know there is still more to do and more accomplishments to better the Granite State. We need our activists from across New Hampshire to be engaged in this upcoming election cycle. When we re-elect Governor Chris Sununu and send him expanded majorities in the House, Senate, and Executive Council, we won’t just be defying history - we’ll be making it. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS NHFRW LILAC LUNCHEON PHOTO OF THE WEEK Photo from the fundraiser Wednesday night in Concord! House Republicans are fired up for November and the chance to build on our Majority! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week shines on State Representative Lisa Freeman! Representative Freeman is a rock star advocate for Republicanism in Concord while also serving on the Manchester School Board. She always goes above and beyond the call of duty and is a super NHGOP activist and elected official. Thank you for all you do, Lisa! TWEETS**OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire. In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law. In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord. | | Dear Friend, We are in the final stages of our campaign and we can't do it without you. There are three opportunities left to help the campaign. This weekend we will be going door to door on **Saturday, May 12th from 10:00 am - 2:00 pm in Eagle and Meridian Idaho. **If you are interested in this please call **(208) 949-6778**. **Monday, May 14th** we will be hosting our last phone bank before the election from 5:30 pm - 7:30 pm at **800 West Main Street in downtown Boise., suite 1460.** If you are interested in this please call **(208) 949-6778**. On **Tuesday, May 15th** we will need volunteers spread across the First District waving signs at busy intersections during morning rush hour and during the afternoon commute home. Please call (**208) 949-6778.** If you aren't in the Treasure Valley you can help the campaign by waving signs Tuesday, May 15th on election day in your community. Thank you for your friendship and support!
Leroy for Idaho Team |

name: Dave Leroy
subject: Last Push!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer
body:
---

| | Dear Friend, We need to send Dave Leroy to Congress this Tuesday, May 15th!**[Please donate $50, $100, $250, or $1000 today](http://daveleroy.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jyiibx-kulrqjyiu-y/);** we are trying to raise [**$1,250**](http://daveleroy.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jyiibx-kulrqjyiu-j/) to run radio and television ads all over the state to guarantee that Idaho voters know who the best candidate for Congress is. Due to the help and support we've received from people like you, we are entering the final stage of this Republican primary as the true conservative candidate. We need your help for our last push, we need a member of Congress like Dave who will help support President Trump's agenda. Over the past week, President Trump has shown the American people the kind of leader he truly is. The President showed his courage by pulling the United States out of the Iran nuclear deal, displayed his experience as a negotiator with the release of the American hostages from North Korea, and kept his campaign promise to talk tough with China on trade. name: The White House
subject: A Victory for the World
body:
West Wing: Week in Review
WEST WING

WEEK IN REVIEW
A LOOK BACK AT THIS WEEK'S ACCOMPLISHMENTS
A Victory for the World

“On behalf of the American people, WELCOME HOME!”

– President Donald J. Trump

Early Thursday morning, President Donald J. Trump welcomed home three Americans who had been held in North Korea. First Lady Melania Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and Second Lady Karen Pence joined the President for the arrival.

“The fact that we were able to get them out so soon was really a tribute to a lot of things, including a certain process that's taking place right now,” President Trump said. Vice President Pence added that “to be able to have an opportunity to visit with the detainees on the tarmac was deeply moving to Karen and me.”

In a clear sign the Administration’s diplomatic efforts are working, the President also announced that his much-anticipated meeting with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un will take place in Singapore on June 12th. “We will both try to make it a very special moment for World Peace!” the President tweeted.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3386a8f7139eea47915aa0546404ac603e2ec968708413017240dcae8345af273e64afdc61176dae7274885fe0b290a2e9b
The President and First Lady Welcome the Three American Returnees

What you need to know:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338ebd8f1a656d204e2d27fce5cef5ea16323c310ac45929a326cbbbf1daa1547bea263d79df5b1e584f903e961f72072fc
The President’s Victory for the World in Freeing Three Brave Americans

Withdrawing from the Iran Nuclear Deal

“President Trump withdrew from the Iran Nuclear Deal because the United States cannot permit the world’s leading sponsor of terror to ever obtain a nuclear weapon.”

– Vice President Mike Pence

President Trump ended America’s participation in the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA)—better known as the Iran nuclear deal—this week and will re-impose sanctions on the Iranian regime.

The bottom line is that the nuclear deal failed to protect America’s national security interests. Recent evidence shows that Iran negotiated the JCPOA in bad faith, and the deal handed the Iranian regime far too much in exchange for too little. President Trump remains committed to ensuring that Iran has no possible path to a nuclear weapon. “Finally: A US president is pushing back on Iran’s dangerous and growing power,” the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3380fb29e92caf63e201fd1021a1e029e3b80c0ba1ebbffd34dd42f39fc8b012ca791de246fbf285b2b83c8e26284182a6f
New York Post's Editorial Board wrote.

Read the facts:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3382bb3a6c108e09a65dc95497abb6abe2cb9c88bd57da2eb7497d66808e8a724e2605da2733b59abf2342c6570e1f68d83
President Trump is Ending U.S. Participation in an Unacceptable Iran Deal

Read:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f33872077f771835e555507a9b4f714235297d78cfea5cc3b2a2e9ecac0315b4a32f7900ed674add76b46beb84d2ad644f97
National Security Adviser John Bolton: The Iran Deal Was Betrayed by Its Own Abysmal Record

President Trump’s Nominee to Lead the CIA Shines This Week

“If I am confirmed as Director, you have my solemn commitment that I will position this agency to provide the intelligence support our country needs to meet the challenges of today and those of tomorrow.”

– Acting CIA Director Gina Haspel

Appearing before the Senate Intelligence Committee this week, Gina Haspel showed that President Trump picked the right person to lead the CIA. Haspel is a widely praised career intelligence officer, and by opposing her, some Senators are attempting to block a 33-year career veteran of the CIA—not to mention the first woman ever nominated to be the Agency’s Director.

Current and former intelligence officials attest that Haspel is “unfailingly honest,” “committed to the rule of law,” “professional,” and has a “high moral character.” She has an unparalleled understanding of the CIA, and the Senate should vote to confirm her quickly.

Read the facts:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338d03040e67dec084c41321b9e99167906e9f8f68d031305301109716c7eb88dba8d110573db985dd25a1d05bba5c7cb13
Gina Haspel Has Defended Our National Security

News clips:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f33899189c65300499b593dd6e8bafc2fdfd98bd50e5fda2228bb657fb188e7cd459aa126884d1dc400d646ea0d6a5509f94
Gina Haspel Continues to Earn Widespread Support

What they’re Saying:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f33872eaad39a5617edeeac1fd6dfcfaaedcf11069e099d4b7c737fd7a54c28892745bd4b8c014317d63a879971c40098e1d
Support for President Trump’s Nominee for CIA Director

The First Lady Launches ‘Be Best’

“I feel strongly that, as adults, we can and should be best at educating our children about the importance of a healthy and balanced life. So today, I’m very excited to announce BE BEST, an awareness campaign dedicated to the most valuable and fragile among us – our children.”

– First Lady Melania Trump

First Lady Melania Trump announced the ‘Be Best’ initiative this week to help young children achieve their full potential. The pillars of the initiative address three crucial issues facing families today: child well-being, social media use, and the risk of opioid abuse.

“There is one goal to BE BEST — and that is to educate children about the many issues they are facing today,” the First Lady said in remarks from the White House Rose Garden.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338fb3b3a323f11cae871191453de6f03608944add0e59cb6c5e58f0eee530f37ac0732017f7525b4f3cc4631ba34c9f049
Be Best: First Lady Melania Trump's Initiative

Read the facts:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338776091cc1af09c8a7649418f7c41da032cedc81c6561d9941bb5dea804199e1ac5a383c513803f807c466b395d2d963f
President Trump on Prescription Drug Take Back Day

Lower Drug Prices for Americans

“It’s going to take years of restructuring this system. But these are big, bold steps, and it’s the most comprehensive attack on prescription drug affordability in history by any President.”

– Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar

Yesterday, President Trump rolled out the most comprehensive approach to making prescription drugs affordable in U.S. history. The President’s blueprint to lower drug prices has four major components: increasing competition in drug markets, giving Medicare Part D plans better tools to negotiate discounts, providing incentives for lower list prices, and decreasing patients out-of-pocket spending.

“The American people deserve a healthcare system that takes care of them—not one that taxes and takes advantage of our patients and our consumers and our citizens,” President Trump said upon announcing the new plan.

Read the facts:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3382537037274189818845fe455d6a4e4d64a3fbfae6349d6ed203a76900a5ef4d0f5df68ff57dab7aaefb6f8fa6ddb7b91
President Trump’s Blueprint to Lower Drug Prices

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3382717305404dffcf4c9b2cd444c2accafdaab14c64cad8014ff1cce26b885068962ab3e4fc8dbab43911e3338b0f8e5c8
President Trump Gives Remarks on Lowering Drug Prices

Protecting American Tax Dollars

“Our moral duty to the taxpayer requires us to make our government leaner and more accountable.”

– President Donald J. Trump

President Trump is looking out for Americans’ tax dollars by requesting that Congress rescind billions of dollars in excessive spending. The President promised the American people he would reign in out-of-control Federal spending, and he’s using every tool at his disposal to do so.

“The Trump administration and Congress must be responsible with each taxpayer dollar that comes to Washington. Every member of Congress should support these rescissions,” Russ Vought, Deputy Director of the Office of Management and Budget, writes in
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338c7992cbeb64cbb86196ab52a7b1dd6bb5300e1d03ed50b1077ee40ad0d381c3199f814d0fc7e3ec85eb907fc7925f80b
The Wall Street Journal.

Read the facts:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f338866d25e3d1965951bdf1700b5d363de27f9c84b41a9f8f5f5cfb5294261d009a7374e358bdd0d1bbee08a9cdb9bddfa4
President Trump is Protecting American Taxpayer Dollars

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f33838417103b98d87d1805a1fc562fa9eff555ea7ebc83b9ceeeecd992597bb175e7de033b027eb97003594903a5daa558a
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5840876198e9f3380dff8d03dc64701a371d1e7b08e66d734f590d46a7bccd67d4a7344b1ade1a4331408c76e778288aa994b336d0f02bfa
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4f984a2cf21912b58d6cacbe8ba29344ade19e1b5c9d119f374afd650e00fb2f562b878ba931ddc10fb17eb77003d69c295404a33472439ac

| **"Gov. Scott Refuses to Raise Taxes"**
My Champlain Valley
By Haley Bouley
May 10, 2018
Montpelier, Vt. - From the start Governor Scott has been adamantly against increasing taxes- stating that Vermonters simply can’t afford it. The Scott Administration is calling out the legislature, saying its proposals will create 83 million dollars in new taxes. The Governor recently proposed a 5 year education revitalization and tax stabilization plan. He says the plan will plug a 58 million dollar gap in the education fund without taxpayer money. The plan would utilize money from the state's 19 million dollar tobacco settlement, surplus revenues and reserve money, but legislators have not embraced the governor's plans. “As too many of our families and business are well aware, the affordability crisis in Vermont is real, and its undermine economies in most counties across the state in particular the rural areas of our state and the eastern side that battle every day with tax free New Hampshire.” Said Governor Scott. Scott says willing to compromise on some of the point within the revitalization and stabilization plan, but is standing firm on no new taxes. ### Check out the story here: [http://www.mychamplainvalley.com/news/gov-scott-refuses-to-raise-taxes/1172195541](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c4daeea55b&e=19cebfe173)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Banks?=
subject: Reversing Obama's Failed Foreign Policy Agenda
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

It's been an historic week, as we've begun to see the impact of a true America First agenda at home and abroad.

I applaud President Trump for his strong actions against Iran and his initial success with North Korea -- **reversing years of Obama's failed foreign policy. **

Iran is the world leader in support for state-sponsored terrorist organizations, and we simply cannot continue to stand idly by and watch as chaos and nuclear destabilization threaten our allies in the Middle East. My friend, National Security Advisor John Bolton, summed it up nicely [here](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=452f280994&e=bfe3be83a5):
---
| | _"But rather than focusing on behaving responsibly, Tehran has poured billions of dollars into military adventures abroad, spreading an arc of death and destruction across the Middle East from Yemen to Syria. Meanwhile, the Iranian people have suffered at home from a tanking currency, rising inflation, stagnant wages and a spiraling environmental crisis."_ \- John Bolton, NSA
---
| In another historic development, one of Secretary of State Mike Pompeo's first acts on behalf of the Trump Administration resulted in the [release of three Americans being held prisoner](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=e5598c1a6f&e=bfe3be83a5) by North Korea.

We must continue operating from a position of strength in order to end North Korea's nuclear and ICBM missile programs, and ensure the safety of our allies and the stability of the region.

**President Trump's two major foreign policy wins this week are a big step in the right direction.**
---
| Sincerely,

Jim Banks
Member of Congress

name: Tim Ryan
subject: What happened on Primary Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Tuesday night was a great night in Ohio! Our endorsed candidates Aftab Pureval, Ken Harbaugh, and Danny O'Connor all won their primaries. | |
---
Folks, Tuesday night was a great night in Ohio! \-- Our endorsed candidates Aftab Pureval, Ken Harbaugh, and Danny O'Connor all won their primaries. \-- Richard Cordray and Betty Sutton, both champions for working people, were nominated to be our next Governor and Lieutenant Governor. \-- Ohio Democrats nominated a record number of women for Congress! There will be a Democratic woman on the ballot in 10 out of 16 Ohio Congressional districts. But this is just the beginning. National Republicans are already attacking Richard Cordray because they know he'll be a strong contender. And the right-wing billionaire Sheldon Adelson just wrote a _$30 million check_ to keep Democrats from taking the House. **They are scared because we're running strong, game-changing candidates across Ohio and around the country. Let's keep going -- can you chip in to fuel our efforts to turn Ohio blue and take back the House?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: $5 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2892/4076109774/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20180511_30oh_5") [Express Donate: $10 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2895/4076109774/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20180511_30oh_10") [Express Donate: $25 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2894/4076109774/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20180511_30oh_25") [Express Donate: $50 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2897/4076109774/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20180511_30oh_50") [Express Donate: $100 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2896/4076109774/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20180511_30oh_100") [Or, donate another amount](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2899/4076109774/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?refcode=em20180511_30oh_other") Thank you so much for your support, \-- Tim [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a955a/5486deaa/28e8607f/dcc2898/4076109774/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_may18?refcode=em20180511_30oh_footer")

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Team DWS
subject: Did you see this? (stand with Planned Parenthood)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Debbie is standing up to the Trump administration yet again in support of Planned Parenthood & women's access to reproductive care. And you know, she needs you right there with her. See Debbie's message below. [**_Then add your name to the petition._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc4/622b7b5b/1a825bcf/307b8657/3424749198/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180507b") Thanks! Team DWS \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
Subject: Trump's targeting Planned Parenthood...again I know this is frustrating, for everyone. **But President Trump is, once again, thinking about cutting Title X funding from family planning clinics, including Planned Parenthood.** Which means we must, once again, rise up to stop him. _To deny women access to critical health services is to deny their rights._ [**_Add your name to make 100% clear to President Trump that you support women's access to care, you support Planned Parenthood, and you won't let him get away with denying women's right to care._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc4/622b7b5b/1a825bcf/307b8657/3424749198/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180507b") This new push isn't just about denying Planned Parenthood funds -- it's aimed at denying Title X funds to any clinic that provides, recommends, or refers women to abortion services. **This is, in effect, a domestic gag rule.** Trump wants to pre-determine what reproductive services women can get. This goes without saying -- but Trump is not a doctor. He's not qualified to tell women what care they can and cannot receive. We need to let him know that we will not stand by and let this happen. [**_Add your name >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc4/622b7b5b/1a825bcf/307b8657/3424749198/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180507b") Thank you. Debbie Wasserman Schultz
---

name: Tori DeGiosio, WolfForPa.com
subject: stop domestic abusers from buying guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

Governor Wolf is working to keep survivors of domestic violence safe, but he needs your help.

Thanks to public pressure from supporters like you, the Pennsylvania Senate has already passed bipartisan legislation to take guns out of the hands of domestic abusers.

_But the House still hasn't taken action._

**[Let's help keep the pressure up. Sign our petition and tell Pennsylvania legislators: "Keep guns away from domestic abusers."](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd19/73a2bc12/3db32a12/1fcd70f2/1849266473/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-keep-guns-away-from-domestic-abusers-em?gpsid=14_50_462&source=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_campaign=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Lets+help+keep+the+pressure+up+Sign+our+")** Current law allows people convicted of domestic violence crimes an incredible two months to forfeit their guns -- if a judge actually chooses to require it at all. And when the guns are finally given up, abusers are allowed to hand them over to a friend, a family member, or even a next-door neighbor, allowing easy access to use the weapons against their partners.

**Let me be clear now: these loose restrictions are dangerous and a threat to our communities.**

Governor Wolf is pushing for common sense legislation that would require abusers to forfeit their guns within just 48 hours, and to hand them over to law enforcement officials, a lawyer, or a licensed dealer.

By passing this law, the Pennsylvania House can save lives and prevent a continuing cycle of violence. That's why it's so important to keep the pressure on the House to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers.

**I signed my name, will you sign yours? Tell Pennsylvania legislators to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers:**

[**https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Keep-Guns-From-Domestic-Abusers**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd19/73a2bc12/3db32a12/1fcd70f1/1849266473/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-keep-guns-away-from-domestic-abusers-em?gpsid=14_50_462&source=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_campaign=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomKeepGunsFromDomes")

Thanks for taking action,

Tori DeGiosio
Digital Director
Tom Wolf for Governor | [**Add your name ->**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd19/73a2bc12/3db32a12/1fcd70f0/1849266473/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-keep-guns-away-from-domestic-abusers-em?gpsid=14_50_462&source=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_campaign=em18_180512_dvguns_adv_gq_ful__td&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+nbsprarr")

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Sign my petition -- tell Congress you support my legislation that would allow the Department of Health and Human Services to negotiate with drugmakers for lower prices and would allow for the importation of less expensive but safe and affordable drugs from other countries.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
The greed of pharmaceutical companies in this country is killing Americans.
#
Friends -
During the presidential campaign, Donald Trump promised to take on the outrageously high prices of the pharmaceutical industry. He told us they were getting away with murder.
But the truth is, and this will not surprise you, President Trump has shown time and time again he does not have the guts to do what it takes to police drug companies and lower prices. Yesterday's speech from the president demonstrated that once again.
Here is what I believe: the greed of pharmaceutical companies in this country is killing Americans. In the United States, and this is unique among industrialized nations, drug companies can charge any price they want for prescription drugs. And as a result, we pay the highest prices in the world, by far, for the medicines we use.
If the president were serious about taking action that lowers drug prices, he would be talking about allowing Medicare to negotiate with drugmakers for lower prices. If the president truly wanted to take on the drug companies he would be telling his friends in the Republican Party that it was long past time for the United States to allow the importation of less expensive but safe and affordable drugs from other countries.
I have introduced legislation that would do both of those things, because the goal of a sane health care system in this country should be to keep people well, not to make stockholders rich.
**Add your name if you agree:**
**[Sign my petition-- tell Congress you support my legislation that would allow the Department of Health and Human Services to negotiate with drugmakers for lower prices and would allow for the importation of less expensive but safe and affordable drugs from other countries.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full")**
Taking on the greed of the pharmaceutical industry has been one of my longtime fights. In 1999, I became the first member of Congress to take constituents over the Canadian border to purchase low-cost prescription drugs. With tears in their eyes, working-class women, struggling against breast cancer, were able to purchase the same brand-name medicine they were using in Vermont for one-tenth of the price in Montreal.
For most people, the ideas in my bill are common sense.
But the truth is that the insurance and pharmaceutical companies in this country shamelessly use their cash to peddle influence in Washington. And just this week, we learned that Novartis -- one of the largest multinational drug companies -- paid Trump's personal attorney Michael Cohen $1.2 million. He has no policy or health care experience, so we have to ask: what did he promise them in exchange for this exorbitant fee?
In recent years pharmaceutical companies have spent billions of dollars in lobbying and campaign contributions to make sure that we maintain a dysfunctional, but profitable, approach to health care.
Honestly, I cannot remember Big Pharma ever losing a major legislative battle. They win, the American people lose.
And under this president, they are doing a lot more winning.
It does not have to be that way. We do not have to accept the fact that these giant businesses are profiting from the pain and suffering of middle-class Americans. We do not have to tolerate that one in five adults in America cannot afford their prescriptions while pharmaceutical CEOs make millions -- and have gotten even richer as some of the biggest winners in Trump's tax scam.
This has got to change. And change starts with making your voices heard.
**[Sign my petition-- tell Congress you support my legislation that would allow the Department of Health and Human Services to negotiate with drugmakers for lower prices and would allow for the importation of less expensive but safe and affordable drugs from other countries.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full")**
Keep the faith sisters and brothers. And please remember, despair is not an option. We must keep fighting.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/drug-prices-petition?source=em180512-t1-full")****

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: BREAKING...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Today, together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention. And we owe it all to the dedication and support of......
Friend, today marks a turning point in our campaign, the day we shift our eyes from the primary, and onto the general.

Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention.

And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of grassroots supporters, like you.

So first, let me say, thank you.

Now, this victory is a cause for celebration, but times like these can create tension between other members of our party. And friend, that makes us ALL weaker.

Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now.

[**So today, I am calling for unity, and I am personally asking for you to join me with a gift of $25.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7dbc16a5349747b5b04d412b54ede9dc&_e=5oPeVuAJavmlCawHW87KMIutHYIOQk1klU2eO1yG_ASGnZ47QPEOn0sGkvz1eeAI2iVPMX9Dw92MV3hzMBiIp8t0GY2etHwBkBfOrdQzTy7c5SoZzpmWq-B97WKcY1FRaeHqZ8Exi5OGfmOiKCS6JiPByPoUvJR3NV7HyK6fMVI11mOBVlY_Ea7SBUoJrRYe3NAfqMgN2STnIXbNotnTlLpvjVYULVM9Et4eF89OEAps6nTFMpD3otEgiqIm_l0ESewyG1tk3shyagJduGAsvH6QR4Wng9KBouurpuIw8dk33M6w1rhTt6S40Bw5UQkLxHe8IQiY7OfYclc3BOGX4lHOclt5Eb2oPTLi9VvgS6C3z0DyHO8bqrHxQEDAKonRRGuKAfHDL452f2GSUhAnIagfkwE5r7KodtOFFVY5tdF2fuYNyox_CcVXshlBTCx7)

We need to look straight ahead, towards the general election and focus on a November victory.

Believe me, dissension is what Tammy Baldwin and the liberal establishment will be doing – along with collecting millions from their mega donors.

If Republicans are fighting with each other, rather than focusing on defeating Baldwin, our resources will be split, our message will be distorted, and friend, we might not be able to make it out of that mess.

If we want conservative victories and if we want to put America First and change Washington, we have to come together and defeat obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin.

That means unifying now.
[SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VICTORY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7dbc16a5349747b5b04d412b54ede9dc&_e=5oPeVuAJavmlCawHW87KMIutHYIOQk1klU2eO1yG_ASqUADxR21bD-CUrdkWJrFI9pZSEVMTRzm5mOs3m3CcO7oxhdlTdzD5mx1VLEeb28eVgBXds4YVe4X-oYP2SiFQhEF7ljzJ6jY2oTjtNGnSUMPXsMFqVhZrSgqv7-zj3Yj4b4R_yrRd1BGOJTfGIZen782EixY0lSgWP7bqdsvELC7rqXVvLl-RG_6q0YuvY6vnfpOMkOO17qu-lTrJL55bjEZg12kMiBqSI_2_wghl1sy-0Qo3mtiEd4cIaP9ekBzCT-Zcvstn4b8HtVPoClluwTlCyYz7R9axhlZG6vXyDX3vzXVLoT-eF_i94yD-Df-93f1cIlkra400-MFmEPtcUyOy2zY52wpWoWAgkK6fd32tZH0FCWbqU9WKsJBDots%3D)
---

The stakes are just too high to let anything come in the way of defeating Tammy Baldwin.

Thank you,

Leah

clean_body: Today, together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention. And we owe it all to the dedication and support of...... Friend, today marks a turning point in our campaign, the day we shift our eyes from the primary, and onto the general. Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention. And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of grassroots supporters, like you. So first, let me say, thank you. Now, this victory is a cause for celebration, but times like these can create tension between other members of our party. And friend, that makes us ALL weaker. Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now. We need to look straight ahead, towards the general election and focus on a November victory. Believe me, dissension is what Tammy Baldwin and the liberal establishment will be doing – along with collecting millions from their mega donors. If Republicans are fighting with each other, rather than focusing on defeating Baldwin, our resources will be split, our message will be distorted, and friend, we might not be able to make it out of that mess. If we want conservative victories and if we want to put America First and change Washington, we have to come together and defeat obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin. That means unifying now. The stakes are just too high to let anything come in the way of defeating Tammy Baldwin. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate
